programme.title: Island Odyssey - EP 6

programme.title: Inside Our Gardens by the Bay
programme.desc: It has been 10 years since Gardens by the Bay was launched. What does it take to keep this national showpiece of garden artistry blooming and flourishing? Who are the people behind-the-scenes?

programme.title: The Second Husband - EP 90
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Feng Shanhua overcomes various hardships even after being wrongly accused. This is a story of fate, love, secrets and forgiveness that stem from her relationship with her two families, one of her birth mother and the other of the mother who raised her.

programme.title: Past Life, Present Love - EP 16
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) "Yu Da" tells Ta Ya that he is not the original Yu Da, as the Yu Da she knows has died in the accident. Li Sha goes to her father's office secretly to investigate about the diet supplement.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 1
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) After her brother's sudden passing, Li Zhi-en is compelled to inherit the family business. Her father, Li Xiangfan, pressures her into an arranged marriage with Xu Zhengren. Zhi-en is upset when Zhengren admits he already has a girlfriend but still intends to proceed with the marriage.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 2
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zhi-en and Zhang Shixun fall deeply in love, but everything changes when her mother, Zhao Xianshu, discovers them together. In a moment of fear, Zhi-en lies about Shixun's background, leaving him hurt and convinced that their differences make them incompatible.

programme.title: Hello Taiwan S9 - EP 7
programme.desc: Hello Taiwan strives to present the stories of people from all walks of life in the society. Through these ordinary people's attitudes towards life and work, viewers can witness the dedication and skills of these extraordinary and brilliant people.

programme.title: Hotel Del Luna - EP 13
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Manyue invites Meiluo to visit the hotel and uses the photo to recreate an unhappy childhood memory to take Meiluo's happiness away.

Despite his initial doubts, Mr. Herman hires Aya after seeing her impressive pencak silat skills making her the new protector for the man she tried to punch.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 156

programme.title: Mau Bikin Romantis Ternyata Bikin Nangis
programme.desc: Deva (Ika Diharjo) balances two lives: she’s a pencak silat instructor and a cleaning service worker at Rizki’s (Mahdy Reza) college. Rizki, who is nursing a broken heart after being cheated on, desperately needs a distraction. He asks Deva to pose as his new girlfriend to impress his mother, leading to a fake relationship filled with kicks and complications.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 610
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: SI MANIS PENJAGA HATI YANG TAK INGKAR JANJI
programme.desc: After losing her security job and having her motorcycle taken by Leo (Junior Liem), Aya (Yunita Siregar) chases him down, thinking he’s a thief. Leo is a spoiled rich man who hates being followed by guards. When his frustrated bodyguards quit, Leo's father, Mr. Herman, desperately looks for a replacement. Despite his initial doubts, Mr. Herman hires Aya after seeing her impressive pencak silat skills making her the new protector for the man she tried to punch.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 156
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mau Bikin Romantis Ternyata Bikin Nangis
programme.desc: Deva (Ika Diharjo) balances two lives: she’s a pencak silat instructor and a cleaning service worker at Rizki’s (Mahdy Reza) college. Rizki, who is nursing a broken heart after being cheated on, desperately needs a distraction. He asks Deva to pose as his new girlfriend to impress his mother, leading to a fake relationship filled with kicks and complications.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 610
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 104
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTA GUE ANTI UTANG
programme.desc: Tommy (Hardi Fadhillah) hates his job: collecting debts for his father. His latest assignment is Bu Anisa, who hasn't paid her twenty-five million rupiah debt in five years. Tommy is ready to be firm until he meets Ratih (Naomi Zaskia), Bu Anisa's daughter. Ratih touches Tommy’s heart when she promises to pay off the debt using her meager salary as a village school teacher.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 156
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Manusia Silver Gantengnya Bikin Baper
programme.desc: Dewa (Lavicky Nicholas) moves to the big city with one goal: to get rich and marry his girlfriend back home. But his urban adventure takes a weird turn when he meets Dewi (Larasati Nugroho), a woman who makes a living through a very peculiar and unexpected profession.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 610
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA JUMBO MAS BAKSO
programme.desc: Hendra is a wealthy heir who defies his father by choosing to sell meatballs (bakso) instead of running the family empire. While preparing for a major festival, he is hit by a motorcycle carrying Ratna (Michelle Ziudith), a curvy girl with a huge appetite for meatballs. To Hendra’s fury, Ratna’s boyfriend whisks her away without apologizing. However, fate brings them together again when they cross paths at the very festival Hendra is competing in.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 105
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: ORDER AYAM DAPET JODOH
programme.desc: Reta (Angelica Simperler) is a beautiful but incredibly spoiled woman. After hitting Dion (Qausar Harta Yudana) with her car, she arrogantly offers him money instead of an apology. Disgusted by her behavior, Reta’s mother forces her to live and work with Dion for two months to learn humility and change her ways.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 157
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Habis Gelap Terbitlah Jalan Ke Hatimu
programme.desc: Siska (Aisyah Aqilah) spends her days managing a corn plantation and selling various corn-based treats. Her peaceful life is disrupted when she nearly crashes her truck into Rangga (Junior Roberts), a handsome man who, unbeknownst to her, has been arranged to be her husband by her grandfather. Rangga’s true motive? To marry Siska only so he can sell off her beloved plantation.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 611
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 106
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MINTA HATI DAPAT JANTUNG MINTA PEMBANTU DAPAT JODOH
programme.desc: Ajeng (Bunga Zainal) arrives in Jakarta and is picked up by Marvin (Fero Walandouw), the grandson of Oma Mina (Dini Vitri), her new employer who has just returned from abroad. Oma Mina lives with Toni (Fendy Chow), Marvin’s older brother. Ajeng works as a housemaid, taking care of Oma Mina, from feeding her to preparing her medicine. Marvin and Toni are surprised at how close Ajeng becomes with Oma Mina, as many previous maids quit because Oma Mina was strict and temperamental.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 158
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cinta Kita Ngeri Ngeri Sedap
programme.desc: Sasi (Larasati Nugroho) is a martial arts expert and a gifted athlete, yet she constantly suffers from bad luck-mostly caused by Juna (Hardi Fadhillah). However, as Sasi faces a string of heartbreaks and betrayals from her boyfriends, she realizes that Juna is the only one who has ever truly stayed by her side through thick and thin.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 612
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: MINTA HATI DAPAT JANTUNG MINTA PEMBANTU DAPAT JODOH
programme.desc: Ajeng (Bunga Zainal) arrives in Jakarta and is picked up by Marvin (Fero Walandouw), the grandson of Oma Mina (Dini Vitri), her new employer who has just returned from abroad. programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 6
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Kail Pagi Makan Petang - EP 11
programme.desc: Program mengisahkan tentang teknik memancing dan ikuti pengembaran mereka untuk mengetahui ikan yang ditangkap dan masakan menarik yang akan disediakan.

programme.title: Potong - EP 13
programme.desc: Kisah mengenai seorang pemuda Midun, yang kini menyambung legasi perkhidmatan berkhatan tradisional peninggalan arwah bapanya, seorang Tok Mudim handal di kampung.

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 23
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: JOZAN - EP 3
programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Aku Dan Tok Wan - EP 8
programme.desc: Tok Wan di hantar untuk duduk bersama cucunya, Amir kerana Tok Wan menghidapi kencing manis dan di arahkan tinggal bersama ahli keluarga untuk mendapat jagaan rapi

programme.title: Opah Popular - EP 11
programme.desc: Badrul dan Sofia bertugas di luar negara dan menghabiskan cuti dengan balik ke kampung. Anaknya mereka dipaksa untuk tinggal bersama opah.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2024 - EP 9
programme.desc: Berhibur bersama geng Sepahtu.

programme.title: Megat Extend - EP 13
programme.desc: Kisah komedi kehidupan di kampus sekumpulan pelajar yang tinggal bersama-sama di rumah milik senior mereka, Megat, pelajar senior yang 'in denial' dan tidak mahu untuk meninggalkan kehidupan kampus.

programme.title: Gelap Geli Tak - EP 12
programme.desc: Game show terbaru di hoskan oleh Faizal Ismail. Peserta bersaing antara satu sama lain dalam pelbagai cabaran, tapi muslihatnya mereka ditempatkan dalam persekitaran gelap gelita

programme.title: Tabung Gelak Warna - EP 24
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Sembang Pacak - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Pecah Perut - EP 12
programme.desc: Sebuah program sketsa komedi yang menampilkan barisan pelawak dan pelakon popular seperti Kamal Adli, Sherry Al-Hadad, Shahrul Shiro, Mamak Puteh dan ramai lagi

programme.title: Dahlia - EP 9
programme.desc: Dahlia memiliki segalanya, namun semuanya musnah akibat sikap khianat kawan baiknya sendiri yang ingin merampas semua miliknya termasuk suami, anak & harta.

programme.title: Kennot Brain 2021 - EP 23
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Cinta Round 1
programme.desc: Farid adalah lelaki kutu buku yang selalu dibuli oleh Syakirin, seniornya. Farid bertekad untuk memasuki kejohanan MMA yang dianjurkan oleh universiti mereka supaya dapat diakhiri oleh Syakirin.

programme.title: Bila Aidil Ada Fitri - EP 11
programme.desc: Pada Raya tahun lepas, Fitri dan Aidilmempunyai masalah dimana Fitri soal jodoh Aidil pula putus tunang. Fitri menyelamatkan Datin Mariam dari diragut dan dia meminta Fitri menjadi P.A anaknya.

programme.title: Foot Fairy
programme.desc: When a serial killer with a foot fetish goes on the loose in Mumbai targetting young women, CBI officer Vivan Deshmukh is tasked with finding the murderer. Will he succeed? Release Year: 2020 Director: Kanishk Varma

programme.title: Tigers : Can A Salesman Be A Hero
programme.desc: Ayan, a pharmaceutical salesman, decides to stand against his company after discovering that their new baby formula is responsible for the death of many babies. Release Year: 2014 Director: Danis Tanovic Awards: 2014 Nominee Golden Seashell- Best Film- Danis Tanovic

programme.title: Hero No. 1
programme.desc: A wealthy business heir plights his troth to household chores for the sake of love. Posing as Raju, the man of many talents, he sweeps, mops, cooks, sings, and dances his way into the hearts of his girlfriend's near and dear ones. Release Year: 1997 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Taish
programme.desc: A story of friendship and loss of innocence when two worlds clash amid a wedding when a secret exposes a betrayal, and innocent friends converge with dangerous criminals and intense violence. Release Year: 2020 Director: Bejoy Nambiar Awards: 2021 WinnerPopular Award- Most Popular Supporting ActreSS in a Digital Film- Sanjeeda Sheikh, 2021 WinnerJury Award- Best Direction in a Digital Film- Bejoy Nambiar

programme.title: Babumoshai Bandookbaaz
programme.desc: The film is a quirky ride of a reputed contract killer, Babu, and revolves around love, friendship, rivalries, and revenge. Release Year: 2017 Director: Kushan Nandy Awards: 2018 Nominee Popular Award- Best Supporting ActreSS- Divya Dutta

programme.title: Woh Bhi Din The
programme.desc: Rahul Sinha, a famous photojournalist, returns to his alma mater as a guest speaker and takes a nostalgic trip down memory lane to relive his carefree school days and the moment he first fell in love. Release Year: 2024 Director: Sajid Ali

programme.title: Sonchiriya
programme.desc: In 1975, Indian brigands terrorize the heartlands but meet their end while being hunted down by the police. Release Year: 2019 Director: Abhishek Chaubey Awards: 2019 Winner FOI Online Award - Best Actor in a Supporting Role - Ranvir Shorey, 2019 Winner FOI Online Award - Best Make-Up and Hair Styling - Shrikant Desai, 2019 Winner Special Mention - Bhumi Pednekar - ActreSS

programme.title: Encounter Shankar
programme.desc: An encounter specialist is transferred as CI to a village which is dominated by a local goon.

programme.title: Gadar-Ek Prem Katha
programme.desc: During the partition, Tara and Sakina's joyful marriage is torn apart when her father forces her to remain in Pakistan, separating her from Tara and their family. Release Year: 2001 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.title: Singh Saab The Great
programme.desc: Singh Saab is a responsible tax collector who believes in honesty, but Bhoodev, a conniving man, plots against him. Singh adopts a unique way to teach Bhoodev a lesson. Release Year: 2013 Director: Anil Sharma

Release Year: 2012 Director: Bella Bhansali Segal Awards: 2013 Winner Searchlight Award- Best ActreSS- Farah Khan, 2013 Winner Hindi Film Award- Best Actor- Boman Irani

programme.title: Laapataa Ladies
programme.desc: Two newlyweds find themselves inadvertently separated from their husbands moments after their respective weddings.

programme.title: Ismart Shankar
programme.desc: Shankar, a contract killer, manages to escape after murdering a politician. Later, he helps the police find a murderer when an officer's memory is transferred to him.

programme.title: Middle Class Melodies
programme.desc: Raghava, a young man, runs an eatery in his village but wishes to open a small hotel in a nearby town. However, he faces challenges in his quest and must overcome them to succeed.

programme.title: Qaidi Band
programme.desc: Qaidi Band film revolves around seven innocent under-trials, who give a band performance in the prison to get into the good books of the authorities and secure their acquittal.

programme.title: Naseeb
programme.desc: When Pooja's father disapproves of her relation with Krishna, a humble man, he vows to become wealthy and returns to find that she is already married.

programme.title: Jaaneman
programme.desc: Suhaan, an aspiring actor, is in a fix when Piya files for divorce and forces him to pay a large amount as alimony. To avoid paying her, Suhaan uses Agastya's love for Piya and helps him woo her.

programme.title: Saajan Chale Sasural
programme.desc: A village-based singer attempts to find love and fame in the big city.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez: Kantara
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Dhokha Round D Corner
programme.desc: A criminal breaks into a married couple's home and takes the wife hostage, igniting a tense standoff that surfaces secrets and lies.

programme.title: Double Xl
programme.desc: Two plus-size women who are body-shamed, head to London to prove that dreams matter and challenge the societal norms for beauty.

programme.title: Bhaiyya Ji
programme.desc: A man stands up for his family and seeks revenge for the wrongs done towards his loved ones.

programme.title: Bell Bottom
programme.desc: An undercover agent code-named Bellbottom embarks on a covert mission to free 210 hostages held by hijackers.

programme.title: Binny & Family
programme.desc: Rebellious teenage Binny and her conservative grandfather from Bihar connect after a dramatic incident. Can the contrasting personalities bridge generational gaps and impact each other's lives?

programme.title: Article 370
programme.desc: A young field agent is picked from the Prime Minister's office for a top-secret mission to crack down on terrorism and corruption.

programme.title: Soorma
programme.desc: Soorma is the story of the triumph of the human spirit, about a player, who made headlines for his miraculous comeback after facing a near death experience through sheer determination

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez Kgf: Chapter 2

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Atrangi Re
programme.desc: A Tamil boy meets a girl from Bihar, what follows is a love story for the ages. A non-linear narrative of two romances running in parallel from different timelines.

programme.title: Mastana
programme.desc: A man becomes friends with a neglected child from a wealthy family. But her parents resent the friendship and prevent their daughter from seeing him. When she falls ill, only he can help her recover.

programme.title: Pyare Mohan
programme.desc: Pyare and Mohan, two friends with visual and hearing disabilities respectively, fall in love with Preeti and Priya. When the women are charged with murder, the two try to save them.

programme.title: Looop Lapeta
programme.desc: When her boyfriend loses a mobster's cash, Savi races against the clock to save the day if only she can break out of a curious cycle of dead ends.

programme.title: Deewana Main Deewana
programme.desc: Basant always gets what he wants and when he falls in love with Priya at first sight, he wants her to be his. Later, he impersonates his friend Vasant, who had saved her life before, to win her over.

programme.title: The Diplomat
programme.desc: Follows an Indian diplomat who tries to repatriate an Indian girl from foreign land, where she was presumably forced and deceived into marrying against her will.

programme.title: Bhool Chuk Maaf
programme.desc: Ranjan, a small-town romantic from Banaras, gets a government job to marry Titli, but forgets his vow to Lord Shiva. Trapped by fate, he must fulfil his promise in a funny journey of love.

programme.title: Poongodi
programme.desc: Poongodi rises above her father's male chauvinism, intent on proving herself & pursuing a college education. Her path crosses with Saravanan, a naïve young man who blindly trusts his manipulative stepmother. Uncover the fate of the two kindred souls.

programme.title: Punitha
programme.desc: Maragatham holds her step-daughter Punitha dear, to the point of being overbearing. However, their bond turns twisted & burdened when Punitha finds her soulmate, Kabilan. Amidst family betrayals, can Punitha show her mother the true meaning of love?

programme.title: MANAMAGALE VAA
programme.desc: Narmada's mission to her ancestral village to reunite her father & his estranged family entwines with Kathir's task of finding suitable grooms for his three sisters. What unfolds when they fall in love, striving for a cause against the same enemy?

programme.title: VINODHINI
programme.desc: When her husband, a soldier, disappears in a military accident, Vinothini never loses hope, firmly believing he'll come back. Join her inspiring journey as she cares for his family & meets life's hardships as a single mother with resilience & love

programme.title: PUTHU VASANTHAM
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Selvi longs for the loving embrace & heart-warming bond of a joint family. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds & win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: LAKSHMI
programme.desc: Maha, her family’s financial backbone, marries Selvam, on condition that she will continue to support her family financially even after marriage. Post which they confront challenges that put the family’s peace and happiness to test.

programme.title: IRU MALARGAL
programme.desc: When secrets, societal pressure, and an unexpected wedding come between three childhood friends-Aadhi, Magizhini, and Madhiyazhagi-tradition and emotions clash, turning their lives upside down and testing every bond they hold dear.

programme.title: AADUKALAM
programme.desc: Sathya loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Selvanayagi, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sathya face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Movie- KATHAKALI
programme.desc: Amudhan returns to India from the USA to marry his girlfriend. During his stay, Thamba, a gangster, gets killed and, owing to their bitter past, all suspicions fall on Amudhan.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: This news programme chronicles the latest events, developments, inventions, discoveries and happenings around the world.

programme.title: Movie contd - KATHAKALI

programme.title: Chellame Chellame
programme.desc: Separated at birth, twins Kavin and Nila unknowingly meet at school, setting off truths that force their estranged parents, Vijayalakshmi and Vikram, to confront their forbidden marriage and the painful past that tore their family apart.

programme.title: Annam
programme.desc: Exuding warmth & courage, self-reliant Annam, living with an estranged father and a cruel stepmother, longs for a loving bond to escape her home. Will she find the love she seeks?

programme.title: Kayal
programme.desc: Abandoned by her father and coping with an alcoholic brother, Kayal works as a nurse to be her family's sole provider. She finds happiness in her sacrifice to meet the needs of her brother and sisters. Watch Kayal stand tall in her selfless journey.

programme.title: Marumagal
programme.desc: Aathirai's unyielding passion for helping others constantly lands her in trouble, while Prabhu's self-serving actions show disregard for his own family's well-being. Follow their tumultuous journeys as fate brings them together in marriage.

programme.title: Moondru Mudichu
programme.desc: Nandini is a self-assured girl who puts her family’s happiness above hers. On the other hand Surya hates his mother due to lingering resentments and deliberately bonds with Nandini to cause strife. Watch what destiny has in store for Nandini & Surya.

programme.title: Varappogum 24 Manikkul - EP 1
programme.desc: Vidya, married to Rahul, faces tragedy when his death occurs and she is blamed. ACP Narasimha leads the investigation, turning her life upside down.

programme.title: Nagesh Thiraiarangam - EP 1
programme.desc: The story revolves around Nagesh, who decides to sell his father's old theatre to arrange money for his sister's marriage. What happens when Nagesh realises that the theatre is haunted?

programme.title: Freeticket - EP 1
programme.desc: The host presents a curated compilation of hit songs and memorable snippets from the most popular and trending Tamil movies, celebrating the best of Tamil cinema.

programme.title: Freeticket - EP 1
programme.desc: The host presents a curated compilation of hit songs and memorable snippets from the most popular and trending Tamil movies, celebrating the best of Tamil cinema.

programme.title: Mark Antony - EP 1
programme.desc: Mark, the son of a former gangster, comes across a mobile phone that can time-travel. Using the phone, Mark acquires the ability to save his estranged mother from a grim fate.

programme.title: Ghost - EP 1
programme.desc: After a young man is murdered, his spirit stays behind to warn his lover of impending danger, with the help of a reluctant psychic.

programme.title: Family Padam - EP 1
programme.desc: A middle-class family who can afford movie tickets dreams of making a film to fulfill their younger son's wish to rediscover himself, facing grave challenges.

programme.title: Krack - EP 1
programme.desc: When 3 notorious criminals lock horns with a hot-tempered police officer, Potharaju Shankar, little do they know that they will end up behind bars.

programme.title: Bhajarangi 2 - EP 1
programme.desc: An evil drug baron, Araka, kidnaps innocent villagers to force them into drug production. A forest officer learns of this and takes action to stop him.

programme.title: Vellakara Durai - EP 1
programme.desc: Two friends, Pandi and Murugan, borrow money from Vatti Varadhan to invest in real estate, but their plans fail when a land broker cheats them by selling a burial ground.

programme.title: En Peyar Surya En Veedu India - EP 1
programme.desc: Surya, a tough soldier with anger issues, gets kicked out of the army. Now, he needs a shrink's approval to rejoin and fulfill his dream of serving at the border.

programme.title: Tripura - EP 1
programme.desc: Tripura, whose dreams turn into reality, is taken to Hyderabad for treatment. She falls in love with and marries her doctor, whom she, one day, dreams of killing.

programme.title: Captain - EP 1
programme.desc: Gangster Soori, known as Captain, aids people in need. Meeting Nisha brings transformative love. Will his past hinder a new beginning?

programme.title: Freeticket - EP 1
programme.desc: The host presents a curated compilation of hit songs and memorable snippets from the most popular and trending Tamil movies, celebrating the best of Tamil cinema.

programme.title: Vantha Rajavathan Varuven - EP 1
programme.desc: Aadhi, posing as a driver, tries to reunite his grandfather with his estranged daughter Nandhini, but unexpected troubles arise in the process.

programme.title: Bhaagmathie - EP 1
programme.desc: Chanchala Reddy, an IAS officer, is imprisoned in a haunted house for interrogation. However, things take an unexpected turn when she gets possessed by a spirit.

programme.title: Sir - EP 1
programme.desc: Ashwin, a US-returned architect, falls for Ratna, his widowed maid. As she pursues her dream of becoming a fashion designer, their love quietly challenges tradition and class.

programme.title: Abhraham Ozler - EP 1
programme.desc: Revolves around the personal and professional lives of veteran cop Abraham Ozler, ACP Trichur, who at one time has to take up a serial killing case and the mysterious hunt begins.

programme.title: Mapla Singam - EP 1

When Algerian independence becomes a probability, things get difficult for the 'Harkis'. Considered as traitors by their compatriots, some hope to obtain asylum in France.

programme.title: Sur La Touche

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 2
programme.desc: Leon, still upset about the incident with Florence, perks up when he meets Violette. While Humberto questions his sexual orientation, Belinda makes a name for herself on social media and is offered an interesting collaboration.

programme.title: Movie - Panakkaran
programme.desc: The illegitimate son of a rich man and a singer is raised by a poor drunkard. Before he can commit to the girl he loves, he wants to find out who his biological parents are.

programme.title: Movie - Adaikalam
programme.desc: A father has to suffer the humiliation of being away from his children and eventually being an object of their anger. But this changes once the children discover the truth about their father.

programme.title: Movie - Sivanda Kangal
programme.desc: An honest police officer bravely fights against industrialists who commit various atrocities. Even after resigning, he takes on the notorious businessman Chakravarty.

programme.title: Movie - Pudhayal
programme.desc: This film revolves around money in human relationships and the extent of its impact on the lives of protagonists Satyamurthy and Swarajyalakshmi.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Ettu Patti Rasa
programme.desc: Singarasu is the guardian to a group of villages and goes about resolving disputes. However, he faces problems when he gets preoccupied with work and forgets about his wife.

programme.title: Movie - Pattalam
programme.desc: Two rival groups of adolescents from Holy Bells School engage in occasional tiffs. An unfortunate incident takes place before an athletics tournament which consequently changes their perception.

programme.title: Movie - Agni Natchathiram
programme.desc: Two stepsons of an honest noble man choose different professions. One becomes a police office and the other turns into a goon. The rest of the film revolves around how the two confront each other.

programme.title: Movie - Pangali
programme.desc: A man kills his sister and her husband for their wealth and locks up their son, Sakthivel. With the help of his father's former loyalist, Sakthivel escapes and seeks vengeance.

programme.title: Movie - Dharmapuri
programme.desc: A rich landlord forces Sivaram's father, an honest hardworking man, to leave the village. However, years later, the villagers beg Sivaraman to save them from the cruel landlord and his sons.

programme.title: Movie - Vizha
programme.desc: Sundaram, a 'Parai' artist, falls in love with Raakkamma, who sings at the funerals. But his love life runs into trouble while helping his friend's romance.

programme.title: Movie - Veeran Veluthambi
programme.desc: Veeran Veluthambi is a 1987 Tamil-language action film directed by Rama Narayanan, starring Vijayakanth and Radha Ravi.

programme.title: Movie - Vengayin Maindhan
programme.desc: Three gangsters rape and kill young women in a village and claim that they were killed by a leopard. The same fate approaches the lady-love of a snake charmer, and he sets out to take revenge on them.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Kummi Pattu
programme.desc: A son assumes that his father killed his mother and in a fit of rage, he also rapes the woman who was to marry his step-brother. However, the woman decides to help him overcome his misgivings.

programme.title: Movie - Pasupathi Mey Paa Rasakka Palayam
programme.desc: Pasupathy, whose world revolves around his mother, comes to Chennai and gets a job at a police station. When his mother needs heart surgery, he's ready to go to any length to raise the required funds.

programme.title: Movie - Nayagan
programme.desc: Velu Nayakan, who witnesses the brutal murder of his father, kills a corrupt policeman and escapes to Mumbai, only to become a gangster.

programme.title: Movie - Santhithavelai
programme.desc: On a trip, Aadalarasu meets his lookalike and promises to fulfil the latter's request. His look-alike dies and he takes his place in his family while his own family thinks he is dead.

programme.title: Movie - Annai Kalikambal
programme.desc: Two sisters, Parvathi and Eshwari, are devotees of Goddess Kaaligaambaal. When their aunt is told that the birth of Eshwari's baby will lead to her death, she devises an evil plan.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2013/2014 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 46
programme.desc: We step inside the world of Tijjani Reijnders, joining him at home with his family in Manchester as he reflects on his remarkable rise to the top of the game. From his early beginnings to the bright lights of Manchester City, Reijnders opens up about the pivotal moments that shaped his career, the challenges he's overcome, and the ambitions that continue to drive him.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 18
programme.desc: Ray Parlour spent 15 years with the Gunners, winning three Premier League titles during that time. His third was perhaps the most memorable of them all. The "Romford Pele" looks back at the 2003/04 campaign, the season of the Invincibles.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 7
programme.desc: Former Premier League enforcer Kolo Toure joins Will Perry in the locker room as he unveils his top 10 Premier League moments.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 35
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 45
programme.desc: Late last year PL Stories travelled to Dubai to spend time with Victor Moses, reflecting on a life and career shaped by resilience and determination. We delve into his difficult and deeply personal early years in Nigeria, and the tragic circumstances that led to him seeking asylum in the UK, an experience that would go on to define both his character and career.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 35
programme.desc: At just 21 years old, Alejandro Garnacho has already experienced more in his young career than many others do in a lifetime. Born in the Spanish captial, Garnacho started his career in the Atletico Madrid academy. Released as a teenager, the Argentina international moved to Manchester United, where he went on to make nearly 100 senior appearances for the club over three years before joining Chelsea in the summer.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 32
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: MATCH OFFICIALS MIC'D UP - TUES 14 APR
programme.desc: Join PGMOL Chief Refereeing Officer Howard Webb and former Premier League star Michael Owen, as they use previously un-released audio from the on-field officials and VAR teams to explain refereeing decisions. This ground-breaking broadcast will feature the in-game audio of selected incidents from the 2025/26 season.

programme.desc: Highlights from the latest Premier League Matchweek. Review incorporates all the key moments and manager reaction from every fixture, making it a must-see programme for all Premier League fans.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 35
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 8
programme.desc: Join Togo and African football icon Emmanuel Adebayor as he relives his top 10 Premier League moments. From iconic goals to unforgettable rivalries, this inspiring and entertaining show is packed with candid insights, untold stories, and the passion that defined his career.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 51
programme.desc: As the curtain comes down on Everton's time at Goodison Park, PL Stories takes a poignant look back at one of English football's most iconic grounds. For over 130 years, Goodison has been more than just a stadium; it's been a home, a fortress, and the stage for countless moments of triumph, heartbreak, and unforgettable drama.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 39
programme.desc: Fresh from lifting the Africa Cup of Nations trophy with Senegal, Iliman Ndiaye reflects on a journey defined by resilience, imagination and quiet determination. From the academy pitches of France to the unforgiving grounds of non-league Boreham Wood, and on to the bright lights of the Premier League with Everton, we trace a rise that defied convention and expectation at every turn.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 40
programme.desc: We mark International Women's Day by celebrating the women shaping refereeing across the professional game. programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 23
programme.desc: For Nico Gonzalez, arriving at Manchester City on deadline day in February 2025 was a full circle moment. The son of Francisco Gonzalez, who amassed over 500 appearances for Deportivo La Coruna and went on to be a youth coach at the Etihad from 2016 to 2019, his connection with the Blue side of Manchester was a big factor in his transfer from Porto.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 36
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 18

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 20
programme.desc: Manchester City v QPR on the final day of the 2011/12 season will forever be remembered as the most dramatic of finales to a Premier League season. Shaun Wright-Phillips and Joleon Lescott offer the perspective from both sides, with the final day drama at the Etihad set in the context of Manchester City's Run-In and their pursuit of a first Premier League Title.

programme.desc: He's fondly remembered for grabbing the last gasp goal that won Manchester City their first Premier League title back in 2012, and with 184 goals in just 275 appearances it clear to see why Sergio Aguero has been inducted into the hall of fame. programme.title: FANZONE - FRI 17 APR (Live)
programme.desc: This is the show that puts international fans at the heart of the Premier League conversation. We connect with fans from around the world as they share their views on their teams and favourite players.

programme.title: PREVIEW - FRI 17 APR
programme.desc: We preview Manchester City's blockbuster title clash with Arsenal, Liverpool's trip to Everton for the Merseyside derby, and Chelsea hosting Manchester United.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Nkazimulo Zulu vs. Jake Hadley
programme.desc: This episode features a flyweight championship bout as Jake Hadley takes on the veteran Nkazimulo Zulu. Bonus coverage includes Mutuale Basambombo vs. HP Van Staden and Christian Bobo vs. Adrian Sanchez.

programme.title: WCCB Uisma Lima vs. Shervantaigh Koopman
programme.desc: The IBO Super Welterweight World Championship is on the line when champion Uisma Lima of Portugal defends against undefeated Shervantaigh Koopman at the Emperors Palace in Kempton Park, South Africa. Lima claimed the title with a unanimous decision victory over Sukhdeep Singh Bhatti in December, and will be looking to make his first successful defense against the IBO Intercontinental titleholder, Koopman.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 9: Netanya, Israel - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Krav Maga with Masters Ran Nakash and Avivit Oftek Cohen.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Gennady Golovkin vs. Grzegorz Proksa
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the American debut of future unified middleweight world champion Gennady Golovkin, who takes on Grzegorz Proska. Also on the card, action from kickboxing star Nieky Holzken.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 featuring Abi, Hakuho, Takakeisho and Asanoyama from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Luis Maysonet
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector "Macho" Camacho (48-3 22 KO 150 lbs) looks to continue his winning streak against Luis Maysonet (28-5 28 KO) in a 10-round contest from Foxwoods Resort Mashantucket CT USA.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Nkazimulo Zulu vs. Jake Hadley
programme.desc: This episode features a flyweight championship bout as Jake Hadley takes on the veteran Nkazimulo Zulu. Bonus coverage includes Mutuale Basambombo vs. HP Van Staden and Christian Bobo vs. Adrian Sanchez.

programme.desc: The IBO Super Welterweight World Championship is on the line when champion Uisma Lima of Portugal defends against undefeated Shervantaigh Koopman at the Emperors Palace in Kempton Park, South Africa. Lima claimed the title with a unanimous decision victory over Sukhdeep Singh Bhatti in December, and will be looking to make his first successful defense against the IBO Intercontinental titleholder, Koopman.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 9: Netanya, Israel - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Krav Maga with Masters Ran Nakash and Avivit Oftek Cohen.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Gennady Golovkin vs. Grzegorz Proksa
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the American debut of future unified middleweight world champion Gennady Golovkin, who takes on Grzegorz Proska. Also on the card, action from kickboxing star Nieky Holzken.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 featuring Abi, Hakuho, Takakeisho and Asanoyama from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Luis Maysonet
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector "Macho" Camacho (48-3 22 KO 150 lbs) looks to continue his winning streak against Luis Maysonet (28-5 28 KO) in a 10-round contest from Foxwoods Resort Mashantucket CT USA.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Nkazimulo Zulu vs. Jake Hadley
programme.desc: This episode features a flyweight championship bout as Jake Hadley takes on the veteran Nkazimulo Zulu. Bonus coverage includes Mutuale Basambombo vs. HP Van Staden and Christian Bobo vs. Adrian Sanchez.

programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated featherweights Yuriorkis Gamboa, 'El Cinclon de Guantanamo', (11-0, 9 KOs) and Marcos Ramirez (25-0, 16 KOs) from the Pechanga Resort and Casino in Temecula, California, USA, on October 4, 2008. The two young fighters had a quick ending street brawl that brought the crowd to its feet.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Floyd Mayweather Jr vs. Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: This episode features the WBC World super welterweight title between Floyd Mayweather, Jr. and Oscar De La Hoya that made $165 million in total gross revenue, making it the richest fight ever, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: Featuring Women's CMX Form and Weapons and Girl's Weapons at the ISKA US Open from Disney, Orlando, Florida, USA.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Floyd Mayweather, Jr.
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a heavily-anticipated welterweight bout featuring Floyd Mayweather, Jr. and "Sugar" Shane Mosley. The fight, which generated $78 million in revenue, was Mayweather's first title fight since his comeback from his first retirement. Also on the card, heavyweight Bermane Stiverne and two-weight world champ Marcos Maidana.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Zagreb Grand Prix, where some of the young Judo fans get the opportunity to train with former Olympic champion Mark Huizinga and triple world champion Illias Iliadis. Plus we watch as Judo's biggest star Teddy Riner competes in the +100 kg division.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode is highlighted by a heartfelt interview with the legendary MMA Hall of Famer Tito Ortiz that shows you sides of the former champ you never knew from his childhood to his love of fishing to the man he is today. We stop by "Cowboy" Donald Cerrone's ranch to see you don't need the flashiest training equipment to be a world class fighter. Plus Nate Marquardt gets his dream car and UFC ring girls bring us on a tour of a new gym.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 83
programme.desc: The Teletubbies enjoy a game of 'What's your name?' Later, there's a surprise when a bowl of Tubby Custard joins in with the game!

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S3) - EP 17
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'milk' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of milk - pink milk, banana milk and bedtime milk. Dee even gets a milk moustache!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 7
programme.desc: Messy borrows Zoe's umbrella, and it gets swept away by the rain. Messy and his friends go on a white-water adventure down the drain in search for it.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 23
programme.desc: Tao needs help learning to fly his new wingsuit for a big town event, and Mojo and Bo are the experts. Can they help him find his inner bird before it's too late?

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 7
programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 19
programme.desc: Xuli's flying race around the Academy inspires cadet Tala to fly the Grimbler. But she crashes into a fragile sea arch that could collapse right on top of her!

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 39
programme.desc: A sleepover with their cousin means Bluey and Bingo get to stay up late! But when Muffin shows up exhausted after missing her nap, the girls get more fun than they bargained for.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 42
programme.desc: When Muffin can't stop sucking her thumb, she has to wear a cone of shame. But the cone gets in her way and she can no longer play `sandwich shop' with Bluey and Bingo.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 6
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 7
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures (S1) - EP 27
programme.desc: When Mr Hammond's bald eagle feather is damaged, Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to Alaska in search of another. Along the way, he meets a brown bear fishing for salmon.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit Patch in the Cloud Kitchen. He has found a tiny mouse in his pocket, which reminds him of a tasty treat recipe to make with the Playtimers - pocket mouse pitta!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels help Duggee try out his new outdoor pizza oven. Duggee makes the bases, then the Squirrels each put on all the toppings they like best. Some of their combinations are... interesting!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 14
programme.desc: Duggee is playing with his train set. Choo-choo! It's amazing! The squirrels are curious and want to know all about it.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 13
programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 25
programme.desc: Glitch gatecrashes an academy gliding test, causing calamity in the skies over Argentina.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 24
programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters take control of a rocky situation in the Valley of Balls?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 10
programme.desc: After Thomas makes a mistake with an important silk delivery in India, he causes chaos and confusion by not seeking help.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: Duck is getting frustrated with his new computer game, so Sarah builds a new version.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 14
programme.desc: Duck has been leaving his toys everywhere, so Sarah helps him tidy his bedroom.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 27
programme.desc: Stanley is very busy, so he invents three little robots called the Can Bots to help. They begin well but soon start getting out of hand. Stanley has some reprogramming to do.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 26
programme.desc: There's a funny noise around town. It's distracting the children's music practice and keeping everyone else up. Stanley investigates with the help of Myrtle.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: From disco dancing frogs to skipping puffins and lions that love ballet, the talking animals discuss the best things about dancing.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 37

programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 20
programme.desc: Glitch takes all the sand from the Academy beach, leaving the local crabs with nowhere to hide from hungry seagulls. Can the Go Jetters repair the beach before it's too late?

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey's playgroup is at odds when Indy's baby hospital collides with Rusty's knights and dragons. But in explaining themselves, they both find that their games actually have a lot in common.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 43
programme.desc: Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake, but first she must put away her toys. But nothing can tempt her to clean up, until Dad drops the cake.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 7
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 8
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures (S1) - EP 28
programme.desc: Andy heads to the Galapagos Islands in search of a seabird called a sooty tern. Along the way, he meets a fish called a trevally that leaps out of the water trying to catch birds.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Bella and Lift have fun playing with their favourite red bouncy ball. It drops into the Ice Disco, giving Hettie the Yeti an idea for a bouncy dance!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 16
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels help Duggee try out his new outdoor pizza oven. Duggee makes the bases, then the Squirrels each put on all the toppings they like best. Some of their combinations are... interesting!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 14
programme.desc: Duggee is playing with his train set. Choo-choo! It's amazing! The squirrels are curious and want to know all about it.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 26
programme.desc: Glitch offends some nomads in Mongolia, so it's down to the Go Jetters to take the reins.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 25
programme.desc: Glitch gatecrashes an academy gliding test, causing calamity in the skies over Argentina.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 11
programme.desc: Raul, the Brazilian tank engine, wants to beat Thomas in a game. But Raul's super-competitive nature soon gets him into trouble.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 11
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck are keen to find out who delivered their Christmas presents to them.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: Sarah, Duck and Plate Girl find some unusual inhabitants in the Plant Section at the shop.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 28
programme.desc: Stanley asks Sophie to help out with a few of his jobs whilst she waits for her dino costume to dry. The pair go about town fixing everyone's problems in fun and imaginative ways.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 27
programme.desc: Stanley is very busy, so he invents three little robots called the Can Bots to help. They begin well but soon start getting out of hand. Stanley has some reprogramming to do.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: The talking animals talk about all the things they love about the ocean.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 38

programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.desc: Outside the clubhouse a large crowd has gathered around a hot air balloon with whisperings that someone is going on an adventure!

programme.desc: Roly is trying to force a very large plastic ball into the bin, but it flies out and crashes into a tower that Betty has built.

programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: Smoove Move is embarrassed when his nerdy brother comes to visit.// Skidmark causes a panic when he hunts a snail-eating goldfish at a fancy party.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: After ice skating with his pen pal, Archibald can't remove his too-tight skates. Crackridge has crop circles. Could aliens really be responsible?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 29
programme.desc: When Big Ears' teapot goes missing, Noddy is surprised to find it hanging from a lamp post. And when Bumpy's kennel goes missing too, it's clear there's a mischief maker in Toyland. Noddy needs to investigate before Toyland descends into chaos. Using his investigating kit and with Revs and Bumpy to help, Noddy discovers that it was the Naughticorns playing a game of Dare and daring each other to do silly things.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 30
programme.desc: Noddy and his friends are each given a balloon at the end of Smartysaurus's Science Party. But when lots of the balloons start going pop, Noddy decides to investigate why. Realising that someone must be hiding and popping them, he follows the clues to PatPat and then to the Naughticorns before eventually working out that the balloon poppers are the Ninjas.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 31
programme.desc: Something very strange is happening at the farm - all Farmer Tom's lettuces have been painted pink! Farmer Tom is really upset so Noddy offers to investigate. After talking to PatPat and Smartysaurus he realises that the Ninjas had asked Smartysaurus to make them pink paint so that they could paint the lettuces. They were using them as pom-poms to cheerlead Pink Ninja as she ran the Toyland Marathon Race! The Ninjas are very sorry that they upset Farmer Tom but he tells them that it's alright.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 32
programme.desc: When some pieces from Big Ears' jigsaw puzzle go missing, Noddy investigates: where are the missing pieces? He soon realises someone must have taken them and draws up a list of suspects. Having discounted the Pirates and then the Naughticorns, Noddy is baffled. But when Pat-Pat and the Pockets invite him to share a piece of toy cake, Noddy suddenly has a breakthrough: maybe it wasn't one toy who took lots of pieces but lots of toys who each took one piece.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 37
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Bees didn't sting. All the animals loved the Bees and they especially loved their sweet and yummy honey. The trouble was all the precious honey was disappearing and there was a honey crisis in Tinga Tinga. Something had to be done. Luckily clever old Tortoise has a cunning plan. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 38
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Peacock didn't strut. He was a very proud bird and he wanted to be the best at everything. He wanted to be the best bird-brain in Tinga Tinga. He wanted to be the best flyer in Tinga Tinga and he wanted to have the biggest and the best tail in Tinga Tinga…. But as Lion so wisely points out ‘Sometimes it's not good to get everything you want!' Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 19
programme.desc: Pat has a very special delivery today! Micawber's claws need clipping and Pat needs to deliver not only the claw clippers but Amy the vet too! On the way to the lighthouse though they encounter all sorts of animals needing help today - from a poorly Bonnie with a cold to a fretful Pumpkin who doesn't want to take his horse pills!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 20
programme.desc: Pat and Jess are called to Cardiff to collect a new sorting machine when the Pencaster machine breaks down.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 21
programme.desc: Christine (Big Chris' mum) is visiting Silver hatch. As is Mamma Mia… serious competition ensues!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 22

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 23

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 24
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor has commissioned a bust of himself for Silver Hatch. Disaster strikes when it is dropped, Big Chris tries to make amends, while Marsha distracts Mr Carburettor and the reporter

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 41
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings is having a fairy picnic in Fable Forest that evening. Everyone offers to help set up for the picnic but Queen Sparklewings tells them not to worry - the fairies can do it all. Later, when Noddy and all his friends are approaching Fable Forest Station on the train they discover someone has redirected the train tracks. They can't get to Fable Forest. How will they have the picnic in time? Noddy needs to investigate why the train tracks have been moved.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 42
programme.desc: Noddy returns from a Make and Take party at Pat-Pat's and finds the Builders are constructing a big orange palace in Toy Green. by order of the King of Toyland! Noddy decides to investigate: who is the mysterious King of Toyland? He spots the Knights carrying a royal litter, but all he can see inside is the top of an orange crown. Realising the King's favourite colour must be orange, Noddy remembers seeing Pat-Pat painting a bowl of oranges and wonders if she knows who the King is.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 43
programme.desc: Everyone is decorating special balloons in Toyland. They're going to have a big Balloon Release at the end of the day and see how far they can fly. But when Noddy returns in the afternoon with Big Ears, the balloons have already flown away! Noddy decides to investigate. Following all the clues, he arrives at Deltoid's house. The action hero toy tells him that he only took back his specially decorated balloon. The others were still there earlier.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 44
programme.desc: Noddy and his friends are building a toy tower. Carlton is joining in and having a great time. They've almost finished when one of the brick pieces goes missing! Oh no. How can they finish the tower without the last brick? Noddy needs to investigate. Using his detecting skills Noddy soon finds the missing brick.

For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.desc: Noddy and his friends are building a toy tower. Carlton is joining in and having a great time. They've almost finished when one of the brick pieces goes missing! Oh no. How can they finish the tower without the last brick? Noddy needs to investigate. Using his detecting skills Noddy soon finds the missing brick.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 27
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: The kids have a race to decide who gets to try some extremely rare berries. / When Scallop finds a beautiful and mysterious sea sculpture, she enlists the help of her friends to search the sea for the artist behind the masterpiece.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: When Pixie struggles to recreate an old tradition perfectly, the kids realize they can make their own traditions./ A story told by Chef J inspires Juniper to go in search of snow.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Tag chooses to pair up with her Grandpaw for the Barker Family Talent Show, and together, they search for their winning talent. \ Tag is surprised to learn that today is the Pawston Snoozie-a-Hullabaloozie. With everything shut down for the day, Tag and Scooch take the opportunity to play all over town, while trying not to wake up other dogs.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Tag can't wait to show off her car at the car show. But when Cheddar Biscuit wants to come along and pick up her clown friends along the way, Tag is wary that Cheddar Biscuit will steal her thunder. \ The Not Yet Cadets can't wait to watch Sam’s big race. But when Sam loses his car key, he challenges the Not Yet Cadets to race around town to find it.

programme.title: Dinotrux S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Half dinosaur! Half construction truck! Full-on fun! Watch giant Ty Rux, his little buddy Revvit and the crew come face-to-face with evil D-Structs.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: Lucky rushes to complete all of last year’s resolutions before the clock strikes midnight on New Year’s Eve

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 43
programme.desc: After getting hit on the head, Eep has a vision and sets out to get the Valley to show how thankful they are; Grug feels like he's the biggest joke in Ahhh Valley, so he asks Thunk to make a "buy-o-pic" of him to show people just how truly great he is

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 44
programme.desc: Lerk and Thunk hide all the valley's worms in a cave to protect them from the hunters who want to use them as bait; Grug invents the spear and pitches it to the Valley as a tool that will change cavemanity forever!

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: After a strange creature bites Tuffnut, he believes he'll turn into a legendary Lycanwing dragon when the moon is full unless his friends can save him

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: When Snotlout and Astrid must fly a ceremonial battle axe to a family wedding, they must work together when an Armorwing dragon derails their plan

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: Po and team go to the city of Tikal to get more information on the Protector, but it's easier said than done, since nobody in the town actually knows the identity of the Protector. Blade becomes increasingly frustrated and Po attempts to help her.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: Po and team play a game of Pok-ta-pok against a family of armadillos for the opportunity to talk one on one with Zuma, the leader. The game brings out a highly competitive and aggressive side to Blade, known as "The Beast." Back in China, Colin and Weimin find the Pirate Queen and become part of her pirate crew.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 26
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 27
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!
