For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: Boss thought that breaking his arm was painful;but the true pain starts at pediatrician Dr. Kevin’s "jokes." Boss enlists the playgroup babies to defang the doctor of his "comedian’s disease." Tim obsesses about keeping his little brother safe.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: Boss has an opportunity to get his old job back at Baby Corp;but to get the interview;he’ll need the playgroup babies to help him escape Marsha Krinkle’s super-safe Bubbeezee playroom. Tim nearly misses Kabob Day at school.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: Boss comes face to face with his old nemesis;Bug The Pug;after the playgroup parents decide to throw a Puppy Party. Staci creates a "No-Paperworkist" movement to avoid Buddy From HR’s constant paperwork.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: A run-of-the-mill arts and crafts session turns into an interdimensional adventure from which Harold, George and company may never return.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: Krupp's campers take on rich rivals in a hoity-toity boat race that also features a revenge-obsessed giant salamander. Paging Captain Underpants!

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: The campers' splat-tastic game of paintball is rather rudely interrupted by a foul and formidable fiend known only as Camoflush.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret "Echo" Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) - and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: Shashi finally reveals his master plan.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 51
programme.desc: Hiccup doesn't know who to trust when Viggo and Ryker each tell him that the other has gone rogue, and is sidetracked when a new dragon attacks.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 52
programme.desc: An extremely powerful new dragon attacks Dragon's Edge, and Hiccup makes a dangerous alliance while the fate of the Dragon Eye hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 27
programme.desc: After Hiccup is shot down on a remote island while searching for Viggo and the Dragon Hunters, he questions Dagur's intentions to rescue him.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 51
programme.desc: The Eternal Night covers Arcadia in shadow leading to a long awaited fight between the Trollhunter and Gunmar130226

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 52
programme.desc: To end the Eternal Night, Jim and the Trollhuntersmust risk everything in their battle against Gunmar.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 27
programme.desc: Toby, Claire, and Blinky work to keep the human world unaware of Jim’s absence as they look for ways to rescue him from the Darklands

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Po's moral lines are blurred when he and Blade have to break an untrustworthy hedgehog monk (Zhen) out of jail to get more information on what Klaus and Veruca stole from the Lotus. They learn from Zhen that there are in fact three more weapons, and Po recognizes one of them from a comic book.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Po and Blade must convince a deceased comic book writer's son to give them information about an unreleased comic that may point them toward the next weapon: a whip of fire. However, after the events of 103 Po is now a wanted criminal, so the Emperor's Forbidden Company arrives and captures him. Torn between saving Po and the mission she's sworn to complete, Blade flees and abandons Po.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: Armed with the power of Gaylen's Core, Morando's forces attack Arcadia as the Royals fight to protect their lives and their adopted Earth home.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 26
programme.desc: In the final battle against Morando, Aja and Krel must make an unexpected sacrifice to win the day to save their Akiridion and Earthen homes.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: The evil General Morando launches a coup on the alien planet Akiridion-5. In the ensuing battle, the planet's King and Queen are severely injured, and their surviving son Krel and daughter Aja escape the planet with military commander, Varvatos Vex. They seek refuge on a backwater planet: Earth.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: Turbo and Whiplash meet a strange tick who may be out to harm Turbo.//When the crew starts a prank war, Chet is nervous that he is the next target.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: White Shadow quits racing and it's up to Turbo to convince him to get back on the track.//The crew becomes detectives and meets a strange new creature.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Archibald scores a job as a movie star's stunt double. Loy starts to lose it after getting a disappointing score on Archibald's karaoke video game.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 33
programme.desc: It's Fable Forest Rainbow Day when the big rainbow in Fable Forest sparkles and pops like a giant firework. Everyone is looking forward to it until the colours start fading from the rainbow! Noddy needs to investigate before the rainbow disappears for good! Revs converts into a helicopter so that Noddy and Bumpy can fly over the rainbow to find the pot of rainbow gold. They discover that Cloppycorn has been taking the gold from the pot to give his unicorn horn a special golden glow.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 34
programme.desc: When Noddy sees Deltoid flying in the air he decides to investigate: how can they get Deltoid down? Realising that magic is involved, Noddy goes to see Queen Sparklewings to see if she can help but she tells him her wand has gone missing. Someone must be trying to do magic with her wand! Meanwhile more flying toys appear, first Fuse and then Smartysaurus.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 35
programme.desc: The Naughticorns have borrowed Noddy's music player to practise a special dance for Pat-Pat's Pumpkin Party. But when Noddy arrives at the party, the other toys are all scared by a strange noise. Noddy decides to investigate: what's making the scary noise? Using his investigating skills and following all the clues, Noddy arrives at the Naughticorn Stables where he realises that the scary noise is actually a slowed down tune on the music player.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 36
programme.desc: Something upsets all the animals at the farm at night and no one can get to sleep . Farmer Tom asks Noddy to investigate before night falls so that everyone can go to sleep properly. Using his wwwbook to gather clues and using all his investigation skills Noddy travels all over Toyland to find out what has been disturbing the animals. He works out that the new stickers that PatPat gave to the the animals are made out of glow in the dark paper.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 39
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Aardvark didn't have a sticky tongue. He had a long nose, big clumsy paws and he found it very difficult to eat. Then one day Aardvark's tongue got stuck in the honey log! All his friends pulled and pulled until KERPLING! Aardvark's tongue finally came unstuck. From that day on Aardvark's tongue was all long and sticky - perfect for eating yummy termites. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 40
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Whale didn't spout. Then one day there is a big storm in Tinga Tinga. The winds blew stronger and the ocean waves got bigger and bigger. Suddenly an enormous wave picks up Whale and carries her all the way from the ocean to the Waterhole. SPLOSH! But Whale was so full of water that she couldn't move! How do the animals help Whale get back to the ocean? For once, Elephant has the answer. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 21
programme.desc: It's a snowy day in Greendale, and Ted Glen has invited the kids to his workshop to meet his friend, space expert Professor Farrow. Julian's excited but so is Pat, who has always yearned to be an astronaut. He's even more thrilled when he finds that his special delivery is a space suit - an extra surprise for the kids. When his van breaks down in a snowy lane, he finds an ingenious solution - only to suffer a puncture - and Ted is unable to help...

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 22
programme.desc: It's Chris Beacon's birthday and he's looking forward to spending the day onshore and having a party at the village hall. Pat's SDS mission is to pick up all the presents from everyone who won't be able to be at the party later.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 25
programme.desc: Breeze and Roary swap places for the day (and night). Roary soon discovers the beach is no place for a racing car to live, while Breeze misses the freedom of the beach.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 26
programme.desc: The cars are all gleaming for this evening's race. Roary gets bored and heads out onto the track - with disastrous consequences. Will the cars be ready in time for the big show?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 27
programme.desc: The track inspector is coming to visit and Big Chris is too tired to commentate on the race. A celebrity commentator is brought in to save the day - much to Big Chris' anger.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: Christine is due to take part in a dancing competition and is practising at Silver Hatch. But what happens when her dance partner is taken ill?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 45
programme.desc: The Ninjas are giving a special display of acrobatics and climbing to Noddy, the Pirates and the Knights. It looks amazing! Noddy goes back to Toy Green to tell Big Ears all about it and narrowly misses being run over by the runaway Pirates Galleon. Someone has taken their sticky anchor and without it they've no way of stopping the ship! Noddy needs to investigate before there's an accident! He follows all the clues which leads him to the Knights.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 46
programme.desc: When the Builders' traffic cones disappear from their building site, there is chaos all over Brickabuild. Noddy decides to investigate right away and find out who's taken them. Did the Naughticorns take them for their obstacle course? Or was it Farmer Tom who used them to keep his animals under control. Noddy carefully follows the clues and at last discovers it was the Pirates who took them to use as markers for Stripes' Pirate Galleon Driving Test.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 47
programme.desc: When Fuse's collection of Special Things goes missing, Noddy vows to track them down. He soon works out that Bling was in Fuse's Workshop but it turns out that she just went in to add a Special Thing to Fuse's collection. More clues lead Noddy to Smartysaurus. She admits she went into Fuse's Workshop but tripped on an oil can and fled when she saw all the mess she'd made. As for the Special Things, they'd already gone when she got there.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 48
programme.desc: The Captain is upset because all of his shiny gold coins have been painted grey. It's a disaster as far as the pirates are concerned! Noddy decides to investigate. He realises that the grey coins are actually the gold coin covered with paint. They're not the only things that have turned grey too - Deltoid's shiny gold medal has been painted grey too.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: After Burple and Cutter crash-land in a village of tiny dragons, Burple's unintentional act of courage leads the locals to crown him as their king.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Magnus's superpowered mechano-dragon threatens to replace the Riders. But when it spirals out of control, the town's real heroes have to step up!

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: When easily-distracted Luis is tasked with getting flowers for his grandmother's birthday party, TZG secretly keeps him on track. / When Rodney's honey bees escape from their apiary (artificial beehive), TZG secretly brings them back.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Nicholas keeps stuffing oversized objects inside Eden’s fairy home. But it creates a BIG problem when Harper’s family wants to visit grandma and the car keys are nowhere to be found! / When Harper gets sick, Marcus builds a pulley between their apartments to send Harper treats. But when Qwak, the chipmunk, breaks the pulley, the Dews must step in to keep the treat train running.

programme.desc: The Ninjas are giving a special display of acrobatics and climbing to Noddy, the Pirates and the Knights. It looks amazing! programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: When Kelp and Scallop discover Mr. Pearly has a cave full of stuff they help him to realize it could help a lot of other sea creatures. / When the group goes camping, Kelp helps Ollie learn that even though it didn’t go exactly as planned, they can still have loads of fun.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop help Dad discover the true meaning of family trips. / When the Great Great Grandicorn comes to visit, the kids learn that making mistakes is part of learning.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: When Tag discovers that Scooch is a great baker, she encourages him to start a pupcake stand. But when Tag rounds up more customers than Scooch is prepared to handle, Scooch can’t keep up with the demand. \ Tag and Scooch’s race to pick up the most trash on Pawston Beach is thwarted by Frank and Beans, who just want to make more of a mess.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: It's Ball-entine’s Day, the day when the dogs of Pawston show their affection for each other by exchanging balls. But unfortunately, the town is fresh out, so Tag and Scooch set sail for Ball Island. \ If Tag and Scooch want to leave Ball Island with the balls they chose for their family, they must earn them by proving themselves ball-worthy, through a series of challenges from The Fetcher.

programme.title: Dinotrux S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: Half dinosaur! Half construction truck! Full-on fun! Watch giant Ty Rux, his little buddy Revvit and the crew come face-to-face with evil D-Structs.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free S2 - EP 38
programme.desc: Lucky and the PALs must rescue Julian after he gets in too deep while pledging a secret society at his school

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 45
programme.desc: Eep, Thunk, Lerk, and Womp set out to make it to the end of "The Tunnel of Terror" within the Cave of Secrets; After being rescued by a mysterious creature at the watering hole, Thunk tries to convince the Valley that a "sea thing" exists and it's not just his imagination

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 46
programme.desc: When Grug wakes up without a voice, he and Ugga go on the hunt to find his voice, while Eep, Thunk, and Gran stay behind. But when the Valleyites come to Eep with questions for Grug, she takes this opportunity to be a leader by pretending to have a conversation with Grug in their cave

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: After heroes Hiccup and Toothless save Barf and Belch's life, the grateful Zippleback tries to repay its life debt and abandons riders Ruff and Tuff

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: Determined to create a key to the Dragon Eye, Ryker heads to Glacier Island to find the dangerous Snow Wraith being protected by the Dragon Riders

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: The Dragon Knights make a deal for the Storm Wheel but first must obtain the other Storm Wheel from a mysterious mad scientist. Though Mastodon continues to warn the team about the dangers in using the Tianshang Weapons, they use them in a fight against Klaus and Veruca. The clash of the weapons wakes a dormant volcano!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: The Mad Scientist turns out to be an ally called Akna, who has a history with Blade's brother Alfie. And Blade learns another truth about her brother and his mission. And in the course of a skirmish with Klaus and Veruca, the weapons change hands again.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 35
programme.desc: After Mega Fat is fired from Baby Corp;he’s forced on the path of recovery towards being a Good Baby. However;Mega Fat is more interested in getting revenge on Boss Baby than finding the perfect family to adopt him.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: Boss Baby uses the cover of Halloween Night to sneak into Bubeezee’s Headquarters to shut it all down. Tim covers for Boss by distracting Marisol with a night of trick or treating.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: A brainwashed Boss Baby breaks free from overly sanitized Bubbeezee products. He rallies the Playgroup Babies to run the company out of business by breaking every product in town.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: With fun in short supply, Harold and George persuade Krupp to dump the campers in the middle of the forest so they can learn to rough it.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 35
programme.desc: The pressure's on Harold and George to tell the scariest campfire story ever. Perhaps their tale of an ill-fated frontier dentist will do the trick.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 36

programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and Aubrey is rushing to Chicago for the birth of her sister's baby. Her plane is grounded in a snowstorm, leaving her stranded for the night at a small-town airport.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S5) - EP 64
programme.desc: Duke is BACK and ready to flip more zombies with our expert Zombie flippers, Keith and Alynne. The team checks out a vintage property in a desirable neighbourhood that needs quite an overhaul.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2) - EP 32
programme.desc: Inspired by international film star and cookbook author Sophia Loren's recipe for eggplant parmigiana, Rachael makes the dish in the proper Italian style, with aged Parmigiano Reggiano cheese.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a classic German dish of smothered chicken meatballs and spaetzle, inspired by the traditional Southern meal of chicken and dumplings.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Jake makes two of his favourite super-simple crowd-pleasers. First, Iraqi roast salmon slathered in a caramelised onion and tomato sauce. This main dish is paired with a decadent fudgy date brownie.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 12
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo tags along as diners test their fate with a toxic pufferfish in Tokyo before biding time with a potentially poisonous pokeberry-forward multi-course menu in North Carolina.

programme.title: How She Caught A Killer
programme.desc: The Route 40 Killer targets sex workers with an unknown motive. Detective Linda Murphy goes undercover and gets entangled in a chilling cat-and-mouse game, reminiscent of The Silence of the Lambs.

programme.title: You Better Watch Out
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and Aubrey is rushing to Chicago for the birth of her sister's baby. Her plane is grounded in a snowstorm, leaving her stranded for the night at a small-town airport.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a classic German dish of smothered chicken meatballs and spaetzle, inspired by the traditional Southern meal of chicken and dumplings.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Jake makes two of his favourite super-simple crowd-pleasers. First, Iraqi roast salmon slathered in a caramelised onion and tomato sauce. This main dish is paired with a decadent fudgy date brownie.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2) - EP 30
programme.desc: Arroz con pollo, or chicken and rice, is a traditional Latin American dish loved by millions worldwide. Rachael shows you how to make it quickly and easily so that it becomes a household staple.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 9
programme.desc: Andy's mum Maree is in the kitchen to set an elimination challenge inspired by some of the Allen household's classic retro dishes. Contestants must make them MasterChef worthy, or risk going home.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 12
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo tags along as diners test their fate with a toxic pufferfish in Tokyo before biding time with a potentially poisonous pokeberry-forward multi-course menu in North Carolina.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: As more people are enjoying leisure activities and hobbies at home, the trend of "home entertainment" is gaining popularity. The homes we're featuring today are all about emphasising home entertainment!

programme.title: You Better Watch Out
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and Aubrey is rushing to Chicago for the birth of her sister's baby. Her plane is grounded in a snowstorm, leaving her stranded for the night at a small-town airport.

programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: When web model Kara gets disturbing messages from a fan, influencer Cody comes to her aid. But when the stalker begins to show up in person, "IRL" takes on a whole new level of meaning for Kara.

programme.title: All Fixed Up In An Empty Village (S3) - EP 2
programme.desc: After the thrilling yet overwhelming empty house tour, the team regroups. They're disheartened by the unprecedented scale of the restoration and the mind-blowing state of the empty homes.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: Upon arriving in Pattaya, heavy rain pours down relentlessly. But the Dokbakz don't care. Rain or shine, they go all in. They head to a buggy car experience centre, where they can roam through nature.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3) - EP 15
programme.desc: With rapid societal changes, diverse family structures are emerging beyond traditional norms. In this final episode, we'll explore "customised family interiors" tailored to various family structures.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 10
programme.desc: Today's Mystery Box comes with a twist - our judges present secret ingredients our cooks must use in their dish. The problem is, they won't know what the ingredients are until 30 minutes into their cook.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1) - EP 16
programme.desc: Liz and Chris have both enjoyed living near the ocean and want to provide their three kids with the same experience. However, they have different opinions on how much to spend to make this dream a reality.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a soulful Southern twist on steak Diane, a pan-fried beef steak, by adding Cajun spices to the marinade and serving it with foie gras and Creole dirty rice.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Drawing on his travels, Jake puts his twist on boreka hand pies, filled with tender white beans, spinach and feta. This recipe can work as a side dish or is hearty enough to be the main course.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S5) - EP 65
programme.desc: Our trio of flippers are ready to tackle a 100-year-old Craftsman home in upscale Delaney Park. With only one bathroom sandwiched between two bedrooms, this tiny Zombie needs a lot of work.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2) - EP 33
programme.desc: To celebrate her wedding anniversary, Rachael prepares her famous beet risotto, made with roasted beets, red wine, onions, ricotta salata and more.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Does 'riverside view' mean that little stream over there...? What's the shocking truth about their first-day accommodation that left the Dokbakz crew furious?

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region’s top stories as they happen. Analysts bring Asian perspective to topical and developing issues. Asia Today also emphasizes the diverse cultures and lifestyles of the world’s most populous continent.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. Produced by CGTN’s studios in Beijing and Washington D.C., the show takes a compelling and comprehensive look at China. It explores the country’s business, politics, technology, culture, entertainment and more. China 24 tackles head-on the issues that matter most to the nation and its people, with topical reports highlighting challenges facing this fast-changing country.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: Haiku Poetry

programme.title: Spanish in a Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let’s learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for "happiness" and various forms of "joy" through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.title: Real-Life Travel English
programme.desc: This program is a practical listening course designed to help you understand fast-paced real English that you encounter when traveling abroad.

programme.title: With Mother (R)
programme.desc: This children's program includes a puppet show, cartoon, music, and gymnastics in which children can participate.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 13 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. programme.desc: The program invites doctors from different fields to talk about big and small things about doctors, break the stereotype of doctors and provide audiences with information on medical health from a relaxed and pleasant perspective!

programme.title: Wassup Man! Let's Chill! Let' Go Play! - EP 23
programme.desc: A trip without a purpose, just go on a whim, so simple, are you willing to join us? A journey that witnesses the friendship of men begins!Let's go! Bring a simple bag, ride a hot-blooded motorcycle, and have fun traveling and charging.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 479
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: "Made In Taiwan" records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the "Made In Taiwan" theme content. programme.title: Kangsi Coming
programme.desc: Lead by Kevin Tsai and Dee Hsu, who never fail to entertain their audience by the fast-paced, humorous and fully self-aware hosting style. programme.title: Super Followers

programme.title: Hit the Headlines
programme.desc: Headline Talk Show is a political show co-hosted by anchor Zhou Yuqin and director of the political center Lin Jiayuan. Today's major current events can be seen in "Headline Talk Show"! Taiwan shouldn't just have only one voice, nor should Taiwan have only one color. "Headline Talk Show" is the most daring-speak-out TV show. We speak out your voice!

programme.title: TAKE MY WORD FOR IT - EP 6
programme.desc: This drama centres around the experiences of members of the Police Negotiation Cadre (PNC), a volunteer unit of the Hong Kong police force specialising in negotiations with terrorist members, partakers of local violence, as well as individuals contemplating suicide.

programme.title: Holistic Way+Ninjiom - Themis & What's On Today - EP 13
programme.desc: High Court judge Yan Huizhi investigates a case involving a 14-year-old boy linked to a child's death. Discovering that he had repeatedly offended without punishment due to his age, she demotes herself to the juvenile court to help reform troubled youths.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2786
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2191
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Shining Just for You - EP 4
programme.desc: The drama centers Ye Ling Shuang (Peng Xiao Ran) is a young woman who can foresee great tragedies and disasters before they happen. What will she do in the face of her ‘curse’ as well as the Emperor’s demands?

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 863
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Vengeance of the Bride - EP 1
programme.desc: Eun Seo Yeon is not rich, but everyone knows she has a warm heart. One day, she discovers that the man, Kang Baek San, whom she calls ‘father’ is actually her real parents’ enemy! She embarks on a revenge journey…

programme.title: Vengeance of the Bride - EP 2
programme.desc: Eun Seo Yeon is not rich, but everyone knows she has a warm heart. One day, she discovers that the man, Kang Baek San, whom she calls ‘father’ is actually her real parents’ enemy! She embarks on a revenge journey…

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 35
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: No Return - EP 22
programme.desc: The hospital asks Kwai-sim to decide whether she wants to undergo surgery for the second time. With surgery, she has a fifty-fifty chance of surviving. Otherwise, she will have sequelae, such as chronic back pain and gradual memory loss. Kwai-sim just cannot make a decision. In the prison, Shap-chat, Wai Ho and their chums decide to make a jailbreak as they discover an unfinished tunnel.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 864
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2191
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 36
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Homeland Guardian - EP 24
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Legendary Hong Kong police officer Ho Ho Fai (Jordan Chan), known for his role as one of the Three Tigers, faces a dramatic fall from grace after a failed mission. Joining the Special Duties Unit, he and his team, fight to uncover and thwart a plot against Hong Kong’s financial system.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 12
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2192
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Shining Just for You - EP 5
programme.desc: The drama centers Ye Ling Shuang (Peng Xiao Ran) is a young woman who can foresee great tragedies and disasters before they happen. What will she do in the face of her ‘curse’ as well as the Emperor’s demands?

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 864
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: When a Man Loves a Woman - EP 8
programme.desc: Man (Kwok Tsun On), Fai (Ng Chun Yu), Wah (Esther Kwan) and Shan (Fennie Yuen) grew up together and were very good friends. Man, Fai and Shan even shared an apartment. Fai was a playboy. He liked fooling around without any commitment. Man, on the other hand, was very loyal to his girlfriend - Wah._x000D__x000D_Man and Fai treated Shan as their brothers since she acted like a tom-boy. However, Shan was in love with Fai.

programme.title: Can't Buy Me Love - EP 18
programme.desc: Reluctant to marry into the Tibetan royal family, the willful Princess CHIU YEUNG (Charmaine Sheh) has to find herself a husband as soon as possible. Owner of a gold store TING LOI-HEI (Kwan Kuk Ying) recommends her second and third sons, KAM DOR-LUK (Moses Chan) and KAM DOR-SHAU (Wong Ho Yin) to the Princess, hoping that the royal marriage would bring them out of financial crisis and save their family business somehow.

programme.title: Speakers Of Law - EP 3
programme.desc: Kam Bing-shun (Kenneth Ma) is a top law student. However, due to a miscarriage of justice, he decides to follow the path to becoming a Legal Executive. By means of his diplomatic and tactful approach, Bing-shun gradually builds his own brand, Adviser Kam. The law firm where Adviser Kam works abruptly faces the prospect of closing down. He uses networking to defuse the situation. He is also invited by lawyers Tin Yau-ka (Lam Ha Mei) and Yu Kwok-tung (Stephen Wong) to join their team.

programme.title: Succession War - EP 9
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Food Of Love - EP 26
programme.desc: Gifted cooking talent Tak (Wong Hei) wants to be a successful chef. He does not give up even when his father Kin (Leung Ka Yan) is against the idea. His uncle Kwai (Lau Kar Fai) is on his side and finally Tak is given a chance to learn in a Chinese restaurant in a hotel. There he meets his dream girl Wing (Kennix Kwok) and wins her heart. Tak’s best friend Lam (Fennie Yuen) is upset when she learns about this.

programme.title: Food Of Love - EP 27
programme.desc: Gifted cooking talent Tak (Wong Hei) wants to be a successful chef. He does not give up even when his father Kin (Leung Ka Yan) is against the idea. programme.title: Revolving Doors of Vengeance - EP 1
programme.desc: Hotel tycoon WONG YUK TING’s family starts a legacy dispute immediately after his death. The third son KAI KIT (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) leaves home. His mother is soon forced to leave by his half brothers. Furthermore, KIT finds out that TING has transferred his hotel shares to a stranger KO FUNG, MARTIN (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE). _x000D__x000D_ FUNG comes for revenge. He swears to get hold of the whole hotel.

programme.title: Loving You
programme.desc: A bad-tempered, womanizing cop who always neglects his wife is shot in the head as he hunts down a drug dealer. Though he miraculously survives, he must depend on his wife to nurse him back to health. During the recovery, he begins to re-evaluate his life and repair the damages of his broken marriage.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears...

programme.title: Royal Tramp II
programme.desc: The leader of Dragon clan, Long Er, helps General Wu to overthrow Emperor Kang Xi. However, Long Er is betrayed by General Wu and is rescued by Xiao Bao. As a result, she bestows her virginity and martial arts power to Xiao Bao to fight against Wu. At the same time, Xiao Bao fortuitously unveils the hidden treasures from "The Sutra of 42 Chapters".

programme.title: Sex Beyond The Grave
programme.desc: During World War II, a singer was raped and killed by Master Tao during her escape, with all her valuables stolen as well. Since then, the Tao's house became haunted. Years later, Master Tao's descendant sells the house to a young couple to pay off a massive gambling debt, but the couple soon discover that it is haunted by the vengeful spirit...

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Former SWAT captain Dong Gu suffers traumatic visual loss during a failed mission for which he is forced to take responsibility. He manages to get over and adapt to the situation with his daughter's company, until his nemesis appears and puts his daughter in danger. Despite being blind, Dong Gu must fight to save his daughter.

programme.title: Iceman
programme.desc: Falsely accused of murder, Ming Dynasty Imperial Guard Ying is pursued by his three sworn brothers until a fierce battle leaves all four entombed in ice. Four hundred years later, they awaken in modern Hong Kong, where they must reignite their ancient feud in a world they can barely recognize.

programme.title: Hong Kong Playboys
programme.desc: Sheng is a rich playboy who lives a carefree and fun life with the ladies, until his mother decides that he should get married. Up against other lady killers in his quest to find Miss Right, Sheng must decide what he wants.

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu dies in a skiing accident and his roommate Yoshio marries his wife as well as inherits his entire fortune. At Tamotsu's funeral, Yoshio sees a badly disfigured old man and that is only the beginning of an evil downfall for him...

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua's hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: Fight Back to School III
programme.desc: When millionaire Wong is found murdered in a hotel room, Sing, who bears a striking resemblance to the victim, goes undercover as the deceased to investigate the case. With Wong's marriage already on the rocks, his wife becomes the prime suspect. However, Sing soon uncovers that Wong's close friend is suspicious as well...

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian, in order to seek evidence against his gang. After their release from jail, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, just as Shan successfully cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: The Fate of Reunion
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago, Green Snake gained enlightenment under the guidance of Dao Qing and gradually falls for him. However, her devotion to Dao Qing caused him to reincarnate and go through the pains of death. Since then, she sets out to search for the many reincarnations of Dao Qing over hundreds of years to help him reverse the situation...

programme.title: Teenage Dreamers
programme.desc: Ting Ting is a student in an all-girl high school. She tries out for the school's stage production of Romeo and Juliet with an all-boy school and promptly falls for the lead, Jackson. While Ting Ting is swept away by the excitement of her first love, Jackson turns out to be more of a player than a partner.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: After the Sino-Japanese war, Wing Chun grandmaster Ip Man and his family experience hardship in their hometown and eventually moved to Hong Kong for a new life. He wants to open a martial arts school in Hong Kong, but first he must pass and win the challenges put forth by the local martial arts grandmasters.

programme.title: Girl with the Diamond Slipper
programme.desc: An aspiring TV actress gets into hot water when a stolen diamond is hidden in the shoes she bought for a party.

programme.title: Let's Make Laugh
programme.desc: When a young housewife's debt-ridden, philandering husband leaves her with a mountain of tax debts, a security guard is hired by the tax authority to guard the assets, but he starts falling for her instead.

programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Liang Kun is a skilled martial arts master who left the martial arts world to protect his lover. However, his disappearance leads to her tragic death and as Liang Kun finds a way to survive in the martial arts world, he fights back to avenge his lover's death with the help of a beggar gang leader.

programme.title: Seeding Of A Ghost
programme.desc: It's an erotic gore-fest starring Kao Fei who seeks vengeance against his wife's rapists and killers by soliciting the help of a demented magician. In return, he endures copulating dead bodies as his enemies perish in blood spurting and body exploding glory. It's one of Hong Kong goriest films ever made.

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Prisoner Chi flees away under Master Zhang's custody, causing the latter to be expelled from his clan. On his way to find Chi, Master Zhang arrives at a place where many people vanish for no reason. He soon discovers that it is Chi who captures them in his training to become a serpent demon. The war between human and demon has just begun!

programme.title: Fate Jealous Greed
programme.desc: The film consists of three short horror stories: a man tries to survive after he received a haunted mail predicting his death; while a man mourns the death of his beloved wife, she becomes a ghost and tries to communicate with him; three brothers clash over the care options of their elderly mother during dinner, leading to a terrifying murder.

programme.title: Royal Tramp
programme.desc: Wei Xiao Bao is sent by a revolutionary group to be a spy in the imperial palace and find "The Sutra of 42 Chapters". Xiao Bao soon befriends Emperor Kang Xi but must carry out his mission at the same time, so he is caught between two camps.

programme.title: Open the Coffin
programme.desc: Ghost Hand and his tomb raiders resurface in Jiang City to seek gold in ancient tombs after a 3-year absence. They released an evil spirit from a coffin and all four died at home eventually. Poison and pinholes in the corpses become the sole clue for police investigation. A tomb raid now unfolds as a perplexing and mysterious case.

programme.title: Maybe It's Love
programme.desc: A girl Marble witnesses a murder case and reports it to the police. After much investigation, the police can only sort out the complicated relationships between a rich merchant's mistress, a postman, a shop owner and his wife, but find no clue as to who the murderer is. Therefore, Marble decides to carry out her own investigation...

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory in an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help other coworkers leave safely and fight to kill the monster!

programme.title: Forbidden City Cop
programme.desc: A wild and hilariously anachronistic tale of an imperial guard of the Forbidden City who has no martial arts abilities. When the emperor is abducted, he saved the day with his unusual hobby: tinkering with futuristic inventions!

programme.title: Mother VS Mother
programme.desc: Guan De Xing fell in love with Li Xiao Yun when he was young, but was opposed by his mother and had to marry Zhou Shen Yu. Since then, Li holds a grudge against Zhou. Unfortunately, the son of Guan and Zhou falls in love with Li's daughter, and as the two mothers meet, they start brawling again!

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Former world champion boxer Fai meets fiery young fighter Qi in Macau. As he mentors Qi for an upcoming MMA tournament, Fai rekindles his passion for fighting, life, and the people he cares about.

programme.title: Mr Vampire
programme.desc: Taoist priest Kou is assigned to re-bury a rich man, in the hope that the new tomb will bring further prosperity. When the corpse turns into a vampire and wreaks havoc in the village, his disciples are also hurt by the vampire and possessed by a female ghost respectively. How can Kou save his disciples and hunt down the vampire at the same time?

programme.title: The Flying Mr. B
programme.desc: Mr. Shi, a secondary PE teacher, accidentally takes a "super pill" invented by the science teacher and gains superpower, turning into Mr. B. He uses his superpower to help the school sports team win the championship and prevent crimes. When the triad is made aware of Mr. B's superpower, they try to gain the super pill for nefarious purposes.

programme.title: The Last Tycoon
programme.desc: Gangster Chen Da Qi rises to the upper echelons of power, but finds himself torn between the love of two women, the murderous plots of the secret service, and the looming threat of war.

programme.title: The Enchantress
programme.desc: Shot on the Shaws' lot in the final years of Hong Kong's greatest studio, The Enchantress tells the story of martial artists who disappear in the night! Intrigued, wanna-be detective/swordsman Feng Chi-wu (Mok Siu-chung) is determined to find out what is happening. But when Feng finds out that an evil vampire spirit (Wei Chiu-hua) is killing swordsmen, he's in for more than he bargains for... It's an outlandish fairy-tale and martial arts fantasy, where your fists and sword aren't nearly enough!

programme.title: Illicit Desire
programme.desc: This instant cult classic adapts three erotic and mystical tales from the Chinese classical works, with stories spanning across time from the Tang to Ming dynasties. The stories, filled with characters such as emperors, concubines, monks and fortune-tellers, intertwine in a world of adultery, lust and greed, alongside great costumes!

programme.title: Monkey Kung Fu
programme.desc: Wei Chun is a cocky young man sentenced to jail for killing a man in a fight. One day, Wei Chun picks a fight with a seemingly defenseless old man who completely thrashes him! The old man turns out to be the master of monkey style kung fu and as they become friends, he gives Wei Chun half of a medallion that would direct him to hidden secrets.

programme.title: Heroes of the East
programme.desc: A Chinese man marries a Japanese woman through an arranged marriage and manages to insult all of her Japanese martial arts family by issuing a challenge to her that is misinterpreted by the others. He must then prove how good Chinese Kung Fu really is through a series of duels with the seven Japanese martial artists who come to meet the challenge!

programme.title: Rose, Be My Love
programme.desc: Not a love triangle but a love 'rectangle', Rose, Be My Love is a romantic drama set on the eve of World War II that represents the high standards achieved by Shaw Brothers in both aspects of star power and technical polish.

programme.title: Heaven and Hell
programme.desc: When an angel, Ling, decides to help his two friends who have fallen in love to escape from Heaven, he is sent to live as a human on earth as his punishment. Reincarnated as a cab driver, he sacrifices his own life to save another ill-fated couple and lands in hell, where he has to face off against the ghosts and demons to fight his way out!

programme.title: Enchanting Shadow
programme.desc: A young scholar Ning spends the night in a creepy temple that is said to be haunted. He does not believe in the rumours, but soon meets a beautiful female ghost Nie. Nie is forced to stay in the temple to seduce young men for a powerful demon to feast on. Knowing Nie to be a kind ghost, Ning decides to help her escape from the demon's clutches.

programme.title: The Brave Archer 2
programme.desc: Knowing Guo Jing has won Huang Rong's hand in marriage using the kung fu learned from Jiu Yin manual, Ouyang Feng captures Huang and agrees to release her only if Guo can dictate the content of the manual. Will Guo give in to the threat?

programme.title: Diary of a Lady-killer
programme.desc: Tycoon Zhou is a playboy who is engaged to be married, but that did not keep him from working his charms on as many ladies as he can. He keeps a diary about his romantic escapades and soon, the women with whom he has been intimate with are being murdered one by one. Zhou becomes the number one suspect by the police but is the killer someone else?

programme.title: Clan Of The White Lotus
programme.desc: The head of White Lotus Clan, Lo, is a highly skilled martial artist who supports the Qing government and helps destroy the rebellion group. Hung from Shaolin who kills Lo's brother, is being hunted and hides in another rebel Hu's house. The clan attacks at night killing Hu and his sister, but Hung manages to get Hu's pregnant wife to safety.

programme.title: Lady General Hua Mu-Lan
programme.desc: Mulan disguises herself as a male soldier to replace her aged father in a war against the barbarians. Her courage brings her victory in battles and she was promoted to a general. When Mulan returns home with glory, the chief commander asks her to marry his daughter, forcing Mulan to reveal her true identity.

programme.title: Lady With A Sword
programme.desc: Swordswoman Feng tries to find a group of villains responsible for her eldest sister's death, but is shocked to discover that her fiance, Jin, is one of them. At the same time, Jin's mother and the two other killers are planning to kill Feng. Can Feng fight back and take her revenge?

programme.title: Forever And Ever
programme.desc: Ivy Ling Po plays a young scholar who is manipulated into marrying a nobleman's reluctant daughter. After marrying, he soon discovers the reason for her hesitation. She is stricken with a contagious disease. But, with the power of true love, their romance prevails.

programme.title: Clan Feuds
programme.desc: Tie Zhong Tang, the adopted son of the Great Banner Sect leader, is hunted by the sect's rival for the secret to its hidden treasure. To uncover the truth, he journeys to an island seeking the "Empress of the Day", only to find her dead. There, he unexpectedly meets the sect's founder, the "Emperor of the Night", who reveals that he is Tie's biological father.

programme.title: The Three Smiles
programme.desc: A talented scholar, Bo Hu, is attracted by the pretty maid, Qiu Xiang. In order to get close to her and win her love, he disguises as a servant to work in the same household. Qiu Xiang does not believe Bo Hu when he discloses his true identity to her, only falling in love with him when he reveals his talents and with his friends' help.

programme.title: Invincible Enforcer
programme.desc: A young man is at the wrong place at the wrong time. As he offends a police inspector, he is thrown into jail and even when released, the police goes after him until he has no choice but to become a real criminal. Only a kind and beautiful probation officer is on his side, but can she help him?

programme.title: Return Of The Dead
programme.desc: A long-awaited horror sequel after Enchanted Shadow, this is about three asylum inmates telling their stories. In story one, a husband and wife discover they should be careful what they wish for. A naked female ghost seeks revenge from her watery grave in story two, and a dead prostitute returns as a ghost in the last tale.

programme.title: The Millionaire Chase
programme.desc: It's a fun and wild romp that mixes pleasure with pleasure. A nightclub owner, playboy Peter Chen Ho, has his ways with three sisters while gallivanting across Asia. Each one has a dangling relationship to save - ensuring a series of mishaps and comic moments.

programme.title: A Maid From Heaven
programme.desc: The seventh daughter of the Jade Emperor is banished from heaven to live a mortal life as she is very mischievous. She falls in love with a young village lad Yong, who sold himself to work for the rich so as to bury his father. The goddess sisters help Yong to pay his debt so the lovebirds can be together. Is this going to end happily-ever-after?

programme.title: Duel For Gold
programme.desc: Six swordsmen, including two sisters and their husbands, a ranger and a security man, are trying to steal a million gold taels from the Fu Lai Treasury House, not knowing that one of them is actually an undercover hero. In their quest, they have to double-cross and outwit one another...

programme.title: My Dream Boat
programme.desc: This is a story about the complicated love relationships between a group of young friends who are entangled in a web of love and emotions.

programme.title: The Rescue
programme.desc: Threatened by the Yuan who are closing in to rule the whole of China, a band of Song survivors band together to save their prime minister. This bold and fearless heroes fighting for their cause are led by international star, Lo Lieh (Glass Tears, Killer Clans) and Shi Szu (Lovers Destiny), who must fight their way out of trap after trap. But they can't escape them all, and eventually the two end up in prison... it is either death or a fight to the end!

programme.title: The Love Eterne
programme.desc: Ying Tai disguises herself as a boy to go to school and falls hopelessly in love with her classmate, Shan Bo. After Shan Bo realizes her true identity, he proposes marriage to Ying Tai. However, they are kept apart as she is engaged to another man. Knowing Shan Bo died in despair, Ying Tai is in deep sorrow and kills herself at his grave.

programme.title: Clans of Intrigue
programme.desc: Heroic outlaw Chu Liu Xiang is dining with his friend Monk Wu Hua, when Gong from the Holy Water Palace appears and accuses Chu of stealing the holy water from her Palace and using it for various murders. Chu denies, and is given a month to find the murderer or be killed by Gong. To prove his innocence, Chu decides to investigate the case...

programme.title: The Comedy of Mismatches
programme.desc: Two pairs of lovers got mismatched accidentally. The man disguises as a woman for his sister's wedding ceremony, while his lover disguises as a man to marry another woman. After the marriage mismatches are revealed, the lovers and their families are taken to court, where Prefecture Chief Qiao manages to work out a happy ending.

programme.title: The King Boxer
programme.desc: This tale of a honorable fighter's retraining in the "Iron Palm" style, that became the first international martial arts movie hit and made a continent-spanning star of Lo Lieh.

programme.title: We Love Millionaires
programme.desc: In this romantic comedy, three beautiful Hong Kong salesgirls travel to Osaka in Japan to pursue their dreams of marrying a rich man. They masquerade as high society debutantes and make their way to a posh resort to meet and woo millionaires (or fake ones!).

programme.title: Mercenaries From Hong Kong
programme.desc: Filmmaker Wong Jing produced Mercenaries From Hong Kong, his very first modern-day adventure drama. In the dramatic plot he wrote, he sends superstars Ti Lung, Chen Hui-min, Wang Lung-wei, Lo Lieh and Wang Yu on a deadly mission. The film's action sequences are all closely guided by three great kung fu choreographers, led by Tang Chia!

programme.title: Shao Kang's War Room
programme.desc: Shao Kang's War Room is a Talkshow hosted by Zhao Shao Kang. This programme combines TVBS News source and Mr. Zhao's rich political and media background, to analyse important news deeply.

programme.title: Global Golden Line
programme.desc: It is the first professional reality car show, providing concrete evaluations of cars on the market, the deepest appreciation for classic cars, the hottest trends in the motoring world, and analysis of the latest auto tech trends.

programme.title: Chop Chop Show
programme.desc: The show invites younger generations to talk about relationship, career, entertainment, current affairs, and all the other popular topics that they care and complain about.

programme.title: Citizens' Subjects
programme.desc: Citizens' Subjects utilizes the perspective of Taiwan people and Taiwan events to tell the stories of Taiwan. It takes a light-hearted, humorous approach to interpreting current affairs.

programme.title: Queen
programme.desc: From makeup, skincare, hairstyle, clothing, horoscopes, parenting, to travel, all kinds of fashion-related topics are presented in the program. Pauline Lan leads dozens of professionals and experts across categories to offer the best fashion insights and tips.

programme.title: Global Focus
programme.desc: Bringing you the latest political, economy, information technology and breaking news around the world.

programme.title: All About Health
programme.desc: How well do you know your body? What should you eat to be healthy and energetic? Are health tips available online reliable? Tune in to this programme as the hosts give you all the answers!

programme.desc: Shao Kang's War Room is a Talkshow hosted by Zhao Shao Kang. This programme combines TVBS News source and Mr. Zhao's rich political and media background, to analyse important news deeply.

programme.desc: The show invites younger generations to talk about relationship, career, entertainment, current affairs, and all the other popular topics that they care and complain about.

programme.title: Super Taste: Go Go! Two- Day Trip
programme.desc: Super Taste focuses on funny travel style to discover destinations and local-dishes. Standing on audience's view point, program's hosts introduce every sightseeing sites with close-witness, young and humorous way to announce the spirits of Super Taste.

programme.title: TVBS News
programme.desc: A news programme that provides the latest Taiwan and international news, as well as in-depth analyses of important issues around the world.

programme.title: Global Focus
programme.desc: Bringing you the latest political, economy, information technology and breaking news around the world.

programme.title: News Frontline
programme.desc: This programme features international current issues and interviews with renowned personalities.

programme.title: Battle ATM
programme.desc: Creating a brand-new interactive ATM that combined with puzzle solving and daily life! Guests can win money by taking three rounds of intellectual challenges from the ATM, turn wisdom into money! Futuristic program scenes with video game clearing concept, where challengers engage in the intellectual competition to switch on the ATM. Those who won goes to the ultimate challenge.

programme.title: Hu's Travel Agency
programme.desc: Hu's Travel Agency features TV host Hu Gua with his children Hsiao-Chen and Hu Shih-An, running Taiwan's "most human-centered travel agency." Centered in Miaoli, they blend family bonds and local culture to create heartfelt journeys.

programme.title: Discover New Taiwan Step By Step
programme.desc: The creative production team goes around Taiwan in search of inspiring stories in the country. Get to know more unique individuals and discover the true spirit of Taiwan.

programme.title: Only For Love - EP 4
programme.desc: Hardworking financial reporter Zheng Shu Yi (Bai Lu) is determined to land a front-page story with Shi Yan (Dylan Wang) a successful young CEO that the whole city is talking about. She pulls all the stops, eventually gets through to him and even love blossoms.

programme.title: The Inn 4 - EP 5
programme.desc: Escape to a seaside inn where life slows down and joy takes over. Watch friends run a charming getaway, uncover surprises, and share heartfelt moments in a journey about companionship, healing, and the beauty of living well.

programme.title: Detective Chinatown 2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tang Ren (Wang Baoqiang) lures Qin Feng (Liu Haoran) to New York for the World Detective Contest with prize money. The contest involves finding the murderer of the grandson of chinatown's 'godfather'. The duo teams up again risking lives to solve the case!

programme.title: Call Me By Fire 3 - EP 12
programme.desc: This season upholds the panoramic competition style of its predecessors, intensifying the competitive edge. The brothers' perseverance embodies the essence of male determination and charm.

programme.title: Only For Love - EP 5
programme.desc: Hardworking financial reporter Zheng Shu Yi (Bai Lu) is determined to land a front-page story with Shi Yan (Dylan Wang) a successful young CEO that the whole city is talking about. She pulls all the stops, eventually gets through to him and even love blossoms.

programme.title: Perfect Match 12 - EP 41
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China. Be thoroughly entertained by the sharp and witty Meng Fei, one of the top hosts for shows of this genre, as he presents a unique and humorous approach to interactions between all the participants.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 429
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: The Inn 4 - EP 5
programme.desc: Escape to a seaside inn where life slows down and joy takes over. Watch friends run a charming getaway, uncover surprises, and share heartfelt moments in a journey about companionship, healing, and the beauty of living well.

programme.title: Destined - EP 34
programme.desc: Lin Yu Ru, the daughter of a cloth merchant who's suffered childhood hardships and she is married to Gu Jiu Si who is the notorious son of Yangzhou's wealthiest family, infamous for his indolent ways. They grow closer despite their differences.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 862
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Ms Incognito - EP 6
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A bodyguard hides in a village as a kindergarten teacher to avoid her boss' enemies – but faces a new challenge in a skeptical strawberry farmer!

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 34
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2190
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Homeland Guardian - EP 22
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Legendary Hong Kong police officer Ho Ho Fai (Jordan Chan), known for his role as one of the Three Tigers, faces a dramatic fall from grace after a failed mission. programme.desc: The story follows popular divorce lawyer Cha Eun-Kyung (Jang Na-ra), who finds herself faced with her own marital crisis. She often clashes with rookie lawyer Han Yoo-Ri (Nam Ji-Hyun) over cases. A workplace battle between the two lawyers is about to unfold.

programme.title: No Return - EP 21
programme.desc: Kwai-sim goes to court to testify for Shap-chat. Regrettably, Shap-chat is still convicted. Shap-chat runs into Wai Ho in prison. Some inmate, who is bribed by Sze-hoi, goes after Shap-chat. Wai Ho stands by Shap-chat and protects him. Inmates eventually side with Shap-chat. While Fa-heung pays her respects in the countryside, she accidentally catches sight of Sze-hoi also coming to pay his respects nearby.
